What was it and how much of it?

column1: What does hunger feel like? Hunger feels like an “empty hollow sensation” in your stomach. This may or may not be followed by a “growling stomach”. It may come and go in waves, but over time it tends to build until you eat. It is important not to confuse hunger with a craving or desire to eat. We must learn to decipher between what is hunger and what is a craving.

When do I want to feel it? How much hunger are we talking about? If our goal is to lose weight, then we want to experience/feel hunger for 30-60 minutes before each meal. This amount of time is an indicator that we are in enough of a calorie deficit to lose weight gradually but consistently.
